ques: Search an Xbox Wireless controller with green color and rated above 4 stars.
Search for women's golf polos in m size, priced between 50 to 75 dollars, and save the lowest priced among results.
Find a gaming desktop with Windows 11 Home, and the disk size should be 1TB.
Find climbing gears and sort the results by price high to low. Answer the first 3 results after sorting.
Find the used Nintendo Switch Lite on Amazon then filter by 'Used - Good', tell me the cheapest one that is 'Used - Good'.
Find a Blue iPhone 12 Pro 128gb and add to cart.
Browse black strollers within $100 to $200 on Amazon. Then find one Among these black strollers with over 20,000 reviews and a rating greater than 4 star.
Browse the women's hiking boots on Amazon and filter the results to show only those that are waterproof and have a rating of at least 4 stars and size 6.
Find the cheapest Samsung-made Android tablet with screen between 10-10.9 inches on Amazon. Only answer the cheapest one.
Find a dog bed on Amazon that is washable and has a length of at least 30 inches.
Find the cost of a 2-year protection for PS4 on Amazon.
Find a stainless steel kitchen sink with double bowls on Amazon. Sort the results and find the cheapest one with FREE delivery.
Check reviews for a Ride On Car with 100+ reviews & 4+ stars rating on Amazon. Give me the top review about this Ride On Car.
Browse best selling black hoodies in mens size Big and Tall that is between $25 and $50 on Amazon.
Find the new surge protector on Amazon with 6 to 8 outlets under 25 dollars with customer reviews above 4+ stars.
Find a pair of mens running shoes in black, size 7, 4+ stars and under $50 and add them to my cart on Amazon.
Find the Return Policy for Mens Rhinestone Skull Graphic Shirt on Amazon. Color: Black, Size: XX-Large. If Free return is avaliable, tell me how to return this item.
Show me the list of baby products that are on sale and under 10 dollars on Amazon. Provide at least 2 on sale products
Open Amazon's home page and tell me what the deal is that is going on at the moment, list the names of at least 2 items that are on offer and tell me what percent off they are.
Look for an English language book on roman empire history in the Amazon Kindle store. Sort by newests arrivals and look for a title that will be released within a month.
Search for a wireless ergonomic keyboard with backlighting and a rating of at least 4 stars. The price should be between $40 to $60. Save the product with the 500+ customer reviews.
Find a stainless steel, 12-cup programmable coffee maker on Amazon. The price range should be between $100 to $200. Report the one with the 4+ customer rating.
Search for a set of non-stick, oven-safe cookware on Amazon. The set should include at least 10 pieces and be priced under $150.
Look for a men's waterproof digital sports watch with a heart rate monitor on Amazon. It should be priced between $50 to $100.
Browse for a compact air fryer on Amazon with a capacity of 2 to 3 quarts. It should have a digital display, auto shutoff and be priced under $100.
Search for a queen-sized, hypoallergenic mattress topper on Amazon. It should have a memory foam material and be priced between $50 to $100.
Find a portable Bluetooth speaker on Amazon with a water-resistant design, under $50. It should have a minimum battery life of 10 hours.
Look for a USB-C hub on Amazon compatible with MacBook Pro, featuring at least 4 ports, including HDMI and SD card reader. The price should be under $50. Select the one after sorting by Best Sellers.
Search for a yoga mat on Amazon that is at least 6mm thick, non-slip, and eco-friendly. The price should be under $50.
Find a set of solar-powered garden lights on Amazon with a minimum pack of 10 lights. They should be LED and priced under $50.
Locate the highest-rated fiction book released in 2024 on Amazon, with a minimum of 50 customer reviews.
Find a compact digital camera on Amazon with a zoom capability of at least 10x, rated 4 stars or higher, and priced between $100 to $300.
Search for an electric kettle on Amazon with a capacity of at least 1.5 liters, made of stainless steel, and with a customer rating of 4 stars or above.
Search for a portable air conditioner on Amazon suitable for a room size of 300 sq ft, with energy efficiency rating, and compare the prices of the top three search results.
Find a beginner's acrylic paint set on Amazon, with at least 24 colors, suitable for canvas painting, and priced under $40.
Find a men's leather wallet on Amazon with RFID blocking, at least 6 card slots, and priced below $50. Check if it's available for FREE delivery.
Search for a children's science experiment kit on Amazon suitable for ages 8-13, with at least a 4-star rating and priced under $30.
Locate a queen-sized bedspread on Amazon with a floral pattern, and check if it's available in blue color.
Find a bird feeder on Amazon suitable for small birds, with an anti-squirrel mechanism, and check if it's available with free shipping.
Locate a travel guide book on Amazon for Japan, published in 2024, with at least 20 customer reviews.

Locate a women's yoga mat in purple, with a thickness of at least 5mm, rated 4+ stars, and priced under $30 on Amazon. Check how many colors are available in total, and what is the return and delivery policy.
Search for 'Anker PowerCore 20000 power bank' on Amazon and report the price of the first result.
Search 'Keychron Q1 Pro keyboard' on Amazon and tell me the rating shown on the listing page.
Search for 'Lodge cast iron skillet 12-inch' and report the cheapest option's price.
Search 'Vitamix Ascent A3500 blender' on Amazon and list 3 features from its product description.
Search for 'Apple MacBook Pro 14 M3 Pro' on Amazon. Report whether the listing offers Free Returns.
Search for 'Hydro Flask 21 oz water bottle' on Amazon and tell me how many color variants are available.
Search 'Cosori air fryer 5.8 quart' on Amazon, save the result that has the highest customer review count.
Search 'CeraVe Moisturizing Cream' on Amazon and report the volume listed in the product specifications.
Search 'Logitech MX Master wireless mouse' on Amazon and report the battery life specification.
Search 'LEGO Star Wars set' on Amazon. Among the results, save the set with the most pieces.
Search 'Cuisinart 14-cup food processor' on Amazon and report the wattage.
Search for 'Patagonia Better Sweater fleece' on Amazon and list the available size range.
Search 'Bose QuietComfort Ultra headphones' on Amazon and report the rated battery life.
Search for 'Olaplex No 4 shampoo' on Amazon and tell me whether it is sulfate-free.
Search for 'Wilson NCAA basketball' on Amazon and report the size of the first result.
Open the Books category on Amazon and tell me the title of the first book displayed.
Browse the Electronics category on Amazon and report the brand of the first featured product.
Open the Computers category on Amazon. Report the cheapest laptop visible in the first result page.
Browse the Fashion category on Amazon and tell me how many products under 'Mens Clothing' appear on the first page.
Browse the Beauty category on Amazon and report the most-reviewed Skincare product on the first page.
Browse the Sports category on Amazon. Among the first 10 results, report the brand that appears most often.
Open the Toys category on Amazon and find the most expensive LEGO set on the first page.
Browse the Home & Kitchen category on Amazon and report the price of the first Kitchen Appliance result.
Open the Books category and click into the Fiction subcategory; report the first book title and author.
Browse the Electronics > Headphones subcategory on Amazon and report the lowest-priced item shown.
On Amazon, find a wireless Bluetooth speaker priced between $50 and $100 with 4+ stars and report the top result.
On Amazon, search for laptops priced between $500 and $800 and tell me the brand of the cheapest one.
Filter Amazon products in the Home category to show items under $50 and report the top 3 results.
Find Books on Amazon priced under $20 with at least 4-star rating. Report the highest-rated one.
On Amazon, look for smartwatches priced between $200 and $400. Save the one with the longest battery life.
On Amazon, find a pair of running shoes under $150. Among results with 4+ stars, report the cheapest.
On Amazon, search for portable SSDs priced between $100 and $200 and report the fastest read speed listed.
Find a gaming desktop on Amazon priced between $1000 and $1500. Report its CPU and GPU.
Find air fryers on Amazon priced under $150 with a digital display. Report the cheapest one.
Find women's leggings on Amazon priced between $80 and $120 with 4+ stars and report the brand.
Search 'wireless earbuds' on Amazon, sort the results by Average Customer Review, and report the first result.
Search 'yoga mat' on Amazon, sort by Price: Low to High, and report the cheapest option.
Search 'mechanical keyboard' on Amazon, sort by Price: High to Low. Report the top 3 results.
Search 'coffee maker' on Amazon, sort by Newest Arrivals, and tell me the first result's release date.
Search 'gaming laptop' on Amazon, sort by Featured, and report whether the first result has 32GB RAM.
Search 'tablet' on Amazon, sort by Average Customer Review, and save the highest-rated option.
Search 'standing desk' on Amazon, sort by Price: Low to High, and report the third result's price.
Search 'fiction novels' on Amazon, sort by Average Customer Review, and report the top result with 4.7+ stars.
Search 'cookware set' on Amazon, sort by Price: High to Low, and tell me the first result's number of pieces.
Search 'cordless vacuum' on Amazon, sort the results by Best Sellers, and report the top result.
Sign in to Amazon as alice.j@test.com (password TestPass123!). Add 'Echo Dot' to the cart and report the cart subtotal.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com (password TestPass123!). Add 2 units of a Kindle Paperwhite to the cart and confirm the quantity displayed.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com (TestPass123!). View the cart and report the current subtotal.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Add an Anker power bank to cart, then increase the quantity to 3, and report the new subtotal.
Sign in as david.k@test.com (TestPass123!). Add any product to cart, then remove it, and confirm the cart is empty.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Add a Logitech MX Master mouse and a Keychron keyboard to cart. Report the combined subtotal.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. View the cart, change quantity of any item to 2, and report whether shipping is now free.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Add an item to cart, proceed to checkout, and report the total at the order review step.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Move an item from wishlist to cart and confirm it appears in the cart.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Add 3 different products to cart, then remove the most expensive one, and report the remaining subtotal.
As a guest (not signed in) on Amazon, add any Bluetooth speaker to cart and report the cart count.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Locate a pre-seeded cart item, change quantity to 5, and report the line subtotal.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Add a laptop to cart and report the estimated delivery date shown.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Add an item, change to quantity 0 in cart, and confirm the item is removed.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Add 2 books and check whether the cart qualifies for free shipping (subtotal > $35).
Sign in as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Open Your Orders and report the order number of the most recent shipped order.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!). Open Your Orders and report the total of the most recent delivered order.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Open Your Orders, click into the first delivered order, and report the product name in it.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Open Your Orders and tell me how many orders are in 'delivered' status.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Open Your Orders and report the shipping address used on the most recent order.
Sign in as jessica.m@test.com (password test1234). Open Your Orders and report the payment method on the latest order.
Sign in as emily.r@test.com (test1234). Open Your Orders and report the order number for the first item.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. From Your Orders, open the order detail page and report the estimated delivery date.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Cancel any 'processing' order from Your Orders and confirm the status changes to 'cancelled'.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. From Your Orders, reorder a delivered item and confirm it appears in the cart.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Open Your Orders, pick a delivered order, click Return Items, select one item, choose reason 'Wrong item sent', and submit the return.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Submit a return for a delivered order with reason 'Defective/damaged'. Confirm the return confirmation page shows the refund amount.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Submit a return for a delivered order with refund method 'Original payment'. Report the return ID.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Try to return a 'processing' order from Your Orders and report the resulting error message.
Sign in as jessica.m@test.com (test1234). Initiate a return for a delivered order with reason 'Changed mind'. Confirm the return is created.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Submit a return for 2 items in a delivered order. Confirm the refund amount is the sum of the 2 item prices.
Sign in as priya.s@test.com (test1234). Submit a return for any delivered order and choose refund method 'Amazon gift card'.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Submit a return with reason 'Better price available' and confirm the return record shows that reason.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. After submitting a return, open the return confirmation page and report the displayed refund method.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Submit a return for a delivered order and confirm the order detail page now shows a return status.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Open your Wish List and report how many items are saved.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Open your Wish List and tell me the brand of the most expensive item there.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Add a Vitamix blender to your Wish List and confirm it appears.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Remove any item from your Wish List and report the new item count.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Move the cheapest wishlist item to the cart and report the cart subtotal afterwards.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. From a product detail page, click the 'Add to List' heart and confirm the wishlist counter increases.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Open Wish List and report the categories of all saved items.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Sort your wishlist by date added and report which item was saved most recently.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. From your Wish List, click 'Add to Cart' on any item and confirm it appears in the cart.
Sign in as demo@amazon.com (password demo1234). Open the Wish List and report how many beauty items are saved.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com (TestPass123!). Open Your Addresses and report how many addresses are saved.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Add a new address labeled 'Vacation' (any details) and confirm it appears in Your Addresses.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com (TestPass123!). Open Payment Methods and report the card type listed as default.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Add a new Visa payment method ending in 9999 and set it as default. Confirm the default badge moved.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Open Your Account and edit the phone number to '312-555-0500'. Confirm the change shows on Your Account.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Change your password from TestPass123! to NewPass456! and confirm by logging in with the new password.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Delete the 'Other' shipping address and confirm only Home and Work remain.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Set the work address as the default and confirm via the Your Addresses page.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Remove the Mastercard ending in 8891 from Payment Methods and confirm it no longer appears.
Open the Registry page on Amazon (top nav) and report the four registry types offered.
Open the Sell page on Amazon (top nav) and report the monthly fee for the Professional selling plan.
Open the Gift Cards page on Amazon (top nav) and report any one denomination listed.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Search 'Anker Soundcore earbuds', add the cheapest result to cart, proceed to checkout, and report the order total.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Find a Kindle Paperwhite in the Electronics category, add to cart with quantity 2, and complete checkout. Report the new order number.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Browse Books > Cookbook, add the most reviewed cookbook to cart, and complete checkout using the work address.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. From your wishlist, move the most expensive item to the cart, then complete checkout with the Visa ending 4242.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Search 'Garmin GPS watch', sort by Price: High to Low, add the top result to cart, and complete checkout.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Open Your Orders, pick the latest delivered order, initiate a return for one item with reason 'Inaccurate website description', and confirm the return ID.
Sign in as bob.c@test.com. Find a portable Bluetooth speaker rated 4.5+ under $200, add to cart, and apply checkout. Confirm the order is in 'processing' status.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Add 3 different beauty products to cart. Apply checkout to a new address you create labeled 'Gift'. Report the order total.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. From Your Orders, reorder a previous beauty product, then open the cart and remove any other items so only the beauty product remains. Complete checkout.
Sign in as david.k@test.com. Search for a 4K monitor, filter to those under $700 with 4+ stars, add the highest-rated one to wishlist, and confirm via the wishlist page.
Sign in as alice.j@test.com. Add 2 books to cart, then change one to quantity 3 and remove the other. Proceed to checkout and report the order subtotal.
Sign in as carol.d@test.com. Add an item to cart as a guest, then sign in; confirm the guest cart merges into Carol's cart and report the combined item count.
